title: WorkshopLM Build Week briefing
script:
Briefing: WorkshopLM Build Week.

The central finding is this: WorkshopLM turns messy meetings into professional knowledge work teams can defend, with grounded source documents and brand rules preserving their standards

The evidence adds an important point: Every factual claim retains an exact source locator, so evidence stays inspectable from the editable Map through the final presentation and Storyboard

The practical decision is how to act on this: Teams should use two deliberate sign-offs: approve the grounded Brief before creating professional knowledge work, then approve the Storyboard before rendering Video

audio.instructions: Speak with calm authority at a brisk presentation pace. Preserve source names and technical terms exactly.
